required_operator_inputs: repair the real Projection-and-Flow regression where the public smooth-escape and programmable basin path can collapse to an all-black frame on meaningful stable classes
repair or truthfully bound the current Projection-and-Flow FPS regression with one concrete same-lane before-after witness
keep the slice bounded to Projection-and-Flow smooth-escape and hot-loop repair rather than Explaino work, color-pipeline expansion, renderer replacement, or generic engine refactor
preserve FractalSampleResult and SampleFractalPoints as the shipped legacy sampling surfaces
close only with focused native proof, runtime publish, published-runtime Projection-and-Flow proof, hostile audit, checkpoint commit, machine receipts, push, and a clean tree
forbidden_operator_prompts: claim Projection-and-Flow is repaired while the public smooth-escape path still renders black on stable synthetic classes
claim performance is repaired without a concrete bounded before-after witness on the same Projection-and-Flow lane
replace SampleFractalPoints or FractalSampleResult instead of preserving the shipped legacy sampling path
widen into Explaino integration, color-pipeline expansion, renderer replacement, or a generic engine rewrite
close the slice without commit, machine receipts, hostile-audit proof, push, and a committed-head stale-plan reread

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Projection-and-Flow smooth-escape plus performance repair contract validates successfully
The Projection-and-Flow smooth-escape plus performance repair phased plan stays synchronized
The Projection-and-Flow smooth-escape plus performance repair hostile-audit validator passes
